languages.text: "Рискну предположить, что контекст высказывания Нунциуса интерпретирован вами неверно". {n}Манипулус озадаченно смыкает и размыкает мехадендриты.{/n} "Во всяком случае, мой коллега точно не произносил ничего подобного".

"I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."
languages.original_text: "Рискну предположить, что контекст высказывания Нунциуса интерпретирован вами неверно". {n}Манипулус озадаченно смыкает и размыкает мехадендриты.{/n} "Во всяком случае, мой коллега точно не произносил ничего подобного".

traits.locale_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

"I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

"I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

languages.text: «Me atrevería a decir que debe de haber malinterpretado usted el contexto de la afirmación de Nuncius». {n}El manipulus abre y cierra sus mecadendritas con aire distraído.{/n} «En cualquier caso, mi colega no ha dicho nada ni remotamente parecido a eso».
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: «Me atrevería a decir que debe de haber malinterpretado usted el contexto de la afirmación de Nuncius». {n}El manipulus abre y cierra sus mecadendritas con aire distraído.{/n} «En cualquier caso, mi colega no ha dicho nada ni remotamente parecido a eso».

languages.text: “要我说，您一定是误解了努恩修斯说话时的语境。”{n}操纵者心不在焉地开合着他的机械触须。{/n}“无论如何，我的同僚绝没说过那种话。”
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: “要我说，您一定是误解了努恩修斯说话时的语境。”{n}操纵者心不在焉地开合着他的机械触须。{/n}“无论如何，我的同僚绝没说过那种话。”

languages.text: « Je pense que vous avez mal interprété le contexte de ce qu'a dit Nuncius. » {n}Le manipulus ouvre et referme distraitement ses mécadendrites.{/n} « En tout cas, mon collègue n'a rien déclaré de tel. »
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: « Je pense que vous avez mal interprété le contexte de ce qu'a dit Nuncius. » {n}Le manipulus ouvre et referme distraitement ses mécadendrites.{/n} « En tout cas, mon collègue n'a rien déclaré de tel. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'un ifadesinin bağlamını yanlış yorumlamış olmalısınız." {n}Manipülus, mekadentritlerini dalgın bir şekilde açıp kapatıyor.{/n} "Meslektaşım kesinlikle böyle bir şey söylemedi."
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'un ifadesinin bağlamını yanlış yorumlamış olmalısınız." {n}Manipülus, mekadentritlerini dalgın bir şekilde açıp kapatıyor.{/n} "Meslektaşım kesinlikle böyle bir şey söylemedi."

languages.text: 「あえて申し上げれば、あなたはヌンキウスの発言の文脈を誤解されたに違いありません」{n}マニピュルスは上の空で機械触手を開いたり閉じたりした。{/n}「いずれにせよ、我が同僚は決してそのようなことを口にしてはおりません」
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: 「あえて申し上げれば、あなたはヌンキウスの発言の文脈を誤解されたに違いありません」{n}マニピュルスは上の空で機械触手を開いたり閉じたりした。{/n}「いずれにせよ、我が同僚は決してそのようなことを口にしてはおりません」

languages.text: "Ich wage zu behaupten, dass Ihr den Kontext von Nuncius' Aussage fehlinterpretiert habt." {n}Der Manipulus öffnet und schließt verwirrt seine Mechadendriten.{/n} "Jedenfalls hat mein Kollege etwas dieser Art gewiss nicht gesagt."
languages.original_text: "I dare say that you must have misinterpreted the context of Nuncius's statement." {n}The Manipulus opens and closes his mechadendrites distractedly.{/n} "At any rate, my colleague certainly did not utter anything of the sort."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wage zu behaupten, dass Ihr den Kontext von Nuncius' Aussage fehlinterpretiert habt." {n}Der Manipulus öffnet und schließt verwirrt seine Mechadendriten.{/n} "Jedenfalls hat mein Kollege etwas dieser Art gewiss nicht gesagt."
